summary:
WOMEN IN MINISTRY AND THE END TIMES: Brandon addresses questions regarding female pastoral leadership by referencing Joel chapter 2 and Acts chapter 2, emphasizing that the current era is experiencing an outpouring of the Holy Spirit on both men and women. Brandon explains that it is an "all hands on deck" situation for the last days, asserting that God uses individuals with pure hearts regardless of gender. Brandon cites examples of female ministers like Kathryn Kuhlman and Joyce Meyer, and explicitly mentions his wife, Diana, as his helpmate who is equally called to teach alongside him, sharing that she also receives dreams and visions.

CRITIQUE OF MODERN SOCIETY AND MASCULINITY: Brandon contrasts the biblical calling with his observations of modern culture, criticizing men who lack a backbone, follow trends like wearing skinny jeans, and struggle with their identity. Brandon also expresses concern over contemporary societal confusion, specifically mentioning children in schools identifying and dressing up as animals. Brandon states that God is looking for individuals who will simply say yes to His calling rather than getting caught up in religious traditions or cultural identity crises.

DIVINE INTIMACY VERSUS SPIRITUAL ANOINTING: Brandon distinguishes between operating with a spiritual anointing and having a genuine relationship with God. Brandon recounts a story about Benny Hinn having a vision of standing before Jesus, which illustrated that healing revivals and works do not replace a pure heart. Brandon explains that the anointing is merely a tool or a cloak for operating on earth, whereas true intimacy requires daily communion and sitting at the feet of Jesus. Referencing Matthew 7:21, Brandon warns that performing miracles or casting out devils in God's name does not guarantee entry into heaven if there is no foundational relationship.

THE IMPORTANCE OF LOVE AND PERSONAL PURITY: Brandon shares an experience involving two angels standing over his bed, which taught him that the ultimate divine judgment will be based on how one demonstrated love and treated others with respect. Brandon advocates for maintaining personal purity by guarding one's thoughts and eye gates against offenses and lust. Brandon encourages seeking forgiveness immediately upon sinning, relying on the blood of Jesus, and practicing God's presence in daily life to ensure the home remains a comfortable place for divine manifestation.

FAITH DECLARATIONS FOR HEALING AND PROSPERITY: Brandon declares that believers possess the authority to cast out devils, lay hands on the sick, and reject poverty, which he strictly defines as a curse rather than a blessing. Using true poverty in Haiti as a comparison, Brandon urges the body of Christ to believe in abundant provision, supernatural increase, and freedom from debt. Brandon makes numerous faith declarations over families, marriages, finances, and physical health, while explicitly rejecting fear of viruses, plagues, and diseases. Furthermore, Brandon includes a specific prayer for President Trump, asking for mental and physical protection and the release of wealth for the body of Christ.
rawData: [January 31, 2025]-[The Lord will pour his Spirit out on all flesh]-[https://youtu.be/_sT4RRG6suQ]-[Hey, good morning, family. After I did my last video, I think the major thing people wanted to know is, "Do you have a pastor that is a female?" Folks, let me tell you like this: in Joel chapter 2, the Bible says that in the last days, "I will pour out my spirit upon your sons and your daughters and on your handmaidens"—and that's a female. So we're in those last days. Regardless of whether you want to believe that God can use a female or a male, I'm here to say it's all hands on deck. If the men are not going to do the job and they're sitting back with their thumb in their nose and being lazy, and the women want to take the baton and say, "Hey, I know that God has called me for such a time as this to lead the people, to help bring prayer in," that's where I'm at. If I see the anointing and the presence of God on male or female, I'm going to follow and listen to what they have to say just because of what Joel chapter 2:28 said: "And it shall come to pass afterward that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh; your sons and your daughters shall prophesy, your old men shall dream dreams, your young men shall see visions. And also upon the servants and upon the handmaids in those days will I pour out my spirit." So you see what the word is saying right there? That's what I go by. I know Paul talks about having women be silent in the church and not interrupting, but I believe as we draw closer to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ, we are seeing God put His hand of fire even on His sons, His daughters, and on the handmaidens. I believe that's what we're seeing right now. We can criticize and say, "Well, they shouldn't be in this; women shouldn't do this; women shouldn't do that," but I'm going by Joel chapter 2 in the Old Testament. Then we have Acts chapter 2, which says this is that which was spoken by the prophet Joel. The Holy Ghost and fire came into the upper room and filled them all with tongues of fire, and the women and the men were speaking with tongues of fire, and the glory of the Lord filled that whole place like a mighty rushing wind. So I know what the Lord has shown me concerning these last days. From Kathryn Kuhlman to Joyce Meyer to the people that have ministered to me—she talks about the "Battlefield of the Mind" and some amazing things she went through—I look at the people that God is calling up right now. Like I said, ladies and gentlemen, it's all hands on deck. We have a lot of men that do not have a backbone like a crowbar, who are being limp-wristed, wearing skinny jeans and using fog machines, wanting to follow the crowd—kind of men that don't even know they're metrosexual, that don't even know who they are. I identify myself as a man or a woman—or, "Oh, I identify myself as a dog." I heard that kids in these schools were coming to school saying that they identify as a dog or a cat, and they dress up like a dog or a cat before they come to school. Folks, we don't even know what we are anymore. So God's trying to find somebody that will just say yes without all this religious stuff going, "Well, you know, they can't be used because of their parts." God's saying, "I'm looking for a pure heart," and I can't find one because right now we've got a bunch of knuckleheads that don't even know who they are anymore. I'm not going to sit here and criticize and go, "Well, she can't go up there and lead prayer because she's a female." Folks, you're thinking too small for what God's trying to do in these last days. God said, "I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh." So that's what I'm looking for. If you want to rock in your chair and sit there and criticize everybody who's trying to do something good for God, then you probably shouldn't watch my channel. I believe my wife is called; she's my rearguard, my helper, and my friend. I've seen an anointing on her: she dreams, she has visions, she sees things, and God uses her just as much as He uses me. Yeah, I'm the head of the house, I run our home, I flow with the spirit of the Lord, and I lead my family, but I believe she's my helpmate and she's my friend, and she's here to teach just as much as me. This channel is just not my own; He said, "I've called her to walk beside you, not behind you, Brandon." There are people that get all upset about that and say, "Well, women shouldn't do that," but I'm here to tell you you're wrong because I believe with all my heart it's all hands on deck. We saw that in scripture right here, Joel chapter 2, right here in black and white. In the last days He said, "I'll pour my spirit upon all flesh." So we're going to go with that because Joel prophesied it, and then we see in Acts chapter 2 that this is that which was spoken by the prophet Joel: "In the last days I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh." We're seeing that already, and that was 2,000 years ago. So here we are right now in present day, and the Lord tells us, "Brandon, I'm going to do one last call, one major push for a harvest of souls. Will you be a part of it? I'm just looking for someone who will just say yes, son, who will help me bring in the harvest." I'm saying it from the mountaintops that Jesus Christ is coming. The eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect towards Him, looking for someone that will have a great yielded want-to to say, "Hey God, here am I, send me." Send me to the nations to preach, to teach, to do whatever it takes to bring in the lost. I refuse to let the rocks do my job, for it says in the word that if I don't praise Him, the rocks will cry out. I'm telling you, God is a God that's worthy to be praised, and I refuse to let the rocks do my job. I will praise Him today because He is worthy to be praised. Last night at Wednesday night church, the glory came down and the presence of the Lord was so strong you could feel it. Whenever you go into a church service and it keeps going and going, and you lose track of time in the glory because everything your spirit ever needs is at His feet, people go, "Well, what time am I going home?" If you don't want to sit at His feet, give me the keys and the code and I'll lock up your building for you, because nothing else matters to me. There's nothing in this earth that I want more than to sit at His feet. You can lose yourself in the numbers and the money because it's what the flesh wants, but as for me and my house, we will serve the Lord with all our hearts, all our minds, all our soul, and all our strength, and we'll love our neighbor as ourselves. We'll love those because those two angels that stood over my bed that night said, to make a long story short, what he needs to know is that when he stands before the Father, what he will be judged upon the most is what he did with love. How did he love his brother? How did he love those around him and treat people with respect and honor? What did he do with love beyond anything else? It won't be because I gave this amount of money or I did this. No, how did you walk in love towards your brethren? Love takes no account of a suffered wrong, ladies and gentlemen. In the comment section, love takes no account of a suffered wrong—even to a preacher who's talking trash about you behind your back. I choose to love. I choose to be what Jesus has called me to be in this earth. I stay vertical; I refuse to go horizontal. I go vertical regardless of people cursing you with their mouth or regardless of people coming on here from the occult. It's in Him I move and have my being. He is the one I'm after. Some of you are just after what you can get on this earth, but everything you achieve, unless it's for Him, it will burn up like chaff before His throne. It will either be pure like gold that will stand the fire, or it will be straw and stubble. I choose to not lay up my treasures upon this earth because all I know is that when I get on the other side, He's either going to say, "I knew you," or "Depart from me; I never knew you." I heard Benny Hinn say he was on the table having that heart attack and he was in line to go before the Father. An organist was playing, and Jesus was standing there greeting the people. She would play a certain sound, and the sound was either a welcoming sound or a sound of judgment. Either Jesus gave you a nod of "yes" or "no." As Benny Hinn got before the Father, he saw all his works—the healing revivals, the souls that had come in—but over the course of time his heart had become cold to the Father. The Lord showed me and He showed my wife, Diana, "Brandon, I'll use whoever I want to. Just because you have the anointing and just because you flow under the anointing doesn't mean that I know you." I will use whoever I want. The anointing is not about relationship; the anointing is a tool. We qualify for the anointing, but He doesn't turn it off because it's a tool, just like this shirt covers me or my shaver shaves my head. The anointing is a cloak that helps us to operate in this earth so that we're able to get the job done. Does that make sense? We are the tool, but we are the glove. The Holy Spirit said, "You are the glove; I am the hand that goes in the glove. You are always to deflect the glory to the Father." So that's where we are right now. In these end times, it's all hands on deck, but just because you have some anointing doesn't mean that He's intimate with you. Intimacy is sitting at His feet on a daily basis. "Hello, Father, how are you?" Don't lose yourself in works, numbers, growth, or money. Lose yourself in His breath. "Father, I need You; Father, I worship You. I want to have a revelation knowledge according to Ephesians, that the eyes of my understanding would be enlightened today." I thank You, Lord, that I sit at Your feet. When I sit before You in that day, He either says, "Brandon, I knew you," or "You did a lot on the earth, but I never had a relationship with you." Diana is going to read this to you because it's very important that you understand. Oh, it's just about grace, brother? Yeah, you're saved by grace through faith, not of works, lest any man should boast; it is a gift of God. We understand that, but it's about relationship. I want you to meditate on this scripture while I'm trying to bring you to a conclusion of all the things that you think make you qualified. I'm taking it all back to a heart thing. Holy Communion is holy, but it is an act of worship in my house. It's an act of, "God, I love You; I just want to be at Your feet. I just want to know You more." I just want a personal relationship with the Lord Jesus Christ. Matthew 7:21: "Not everyone that saith unto me, Lord, Lord, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Many will say to me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in thy name? And in thy name have cast out devils? And in thy name done many wonderful works? And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity." I don't want Him saying that to me. It takes some anointing to cast out a devil or raise the dead, but He said, "Depart from me; I never knew you." What is it about? It's about relationship. It's about sitting at His feet and saying, "Jesus, I love You." Communion with Him—a heart thing. For the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect toward Him. I pray, "Father, if Your eyes are roaming right now, help my heart to be what pleases You today." Help my heart, Father, to be somebody that You're able to rest on. At my house, I make this house a place that He would be comfortable coming to. If He was to manifest in real form and knock on the door, would He open your door and look around and go, "Man, there's a lot of sin in here," or does He open your door and go, "I can come in here and have a glass of iced tea with Brandon because I feel comfortable"? Ladies and gentlemen, practice His presence. Father, I don't want anything to come through these eye gates that will offend You. Take captive of your thoughts. Men, don't be going around church lusting after women. You've got to have your eye gates and your mind pure before the Father. He can hear your thoughts. If you have thoughts that are bad, He'll say, "Brandon, check your thoughts." Why? Because it's offensive. We're not perfect, but I'm trying to challenge you to come up higher. Diana and I have got our stuff we're going through just like everybody else, but it's the heart that is quick to repent and says, "Father, I need You." Stop trying to box God in and being so small-minded that you think He has to operate in the way you think He's going to operate. God loves you and He wants relationship with you. He said, "Brandon, tell them to come unto me." Matthew: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls. For my yoke is easy and my burden is light." Run to God when you sin; don't run from Him. Your sin is none of the devil's business. I come to Him with communion when I sin and say, "Father, at Your mercy seat, I bow myself in humility and say, Father, use me. Forgive me; wash me in Your blood; cleanse me from all unrighteousness." The sin issue is already taken care of. He said if you confess your sins, He is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you from all unrighteousness. So I seek Him daily. I just felt it in my heart to spur you to have an intimate relationship with Him. Does He know you? My wife knows me; my kids know me. Do you look at Him as some kind of religious, far-out thing? You've got to take down that wall. "Come unto me and I will give you rest." Lean into Him. Trust, lean on, rely on, and be confident in the Lord. Delight yourself also in the Lord, and He will give you the desires and secret petitions of your heart. Commit your way to the Lord; trust, lean on, rely on, and be confident also in Him, and He will bring it to pass. That's intimacy right there. Abraham staggered not at the promise of God through unbelief, but was strong in faith, giving glory to God. He was fully persuaded—that is confidence—that what God had promised, He was able also to perform. I'm not moved by what I see or hear; I'm only moved by what the word of God says. Jesus Christ, the same yesterday, today, and forever. If He did it 2,000 years ago, He's still doing it today. He's still healing and delivering. He gave us the authority to cast out devils and lay hands on the sick. We have got to come up higher in our thinking and say, "Father, I want more of You. I want more revelation of who You are in me." Abraham was a friend of God. I want Him to call me friend. "I am a friend of God. He calls me friend." Think about it. Who am I that You are mindful of me? That You hear me when I call? Is it true that You are thinking of me? Oh, how You love me. It's amazing. I am a friend of God. Does He call you friend today? My heart is for Him. Search me and know me today. Create in me a clean heart, O God. You are the potter; I am the clay. Help us not to get so stuck on these religious things. I want everything to do with relationship. Father, we lift up this body before You and we thank You that You were wounded for our transgressions, You were bruised for our iniquities, the chastisement of our peace was upon You, and with Your stripes, Lord, we are healed. We thank You that we don't have to be broke, busted, and disgusted anymore. We take this by faith and we are fully persuaded that Jesus Christ is our healer and our deliverer. Now, Lord, we take the blood and we apply the blood of Jesus over our children, my wife, and our finances. Forgive us, Father, of our sins. We enter in by the blood of the Lamb. We plead the blood of Jesus in the courts of heaven. When we mess up or stumble, we call out for the blood. It will never lose its power. Father, I apply it to our home. I plead the blood. Lord, You're beautiful; Your face is all I seek. And when Your eyes are on this child, Your grace abounds to me. Jesus, what a wonder You are. You are so gentle, so pure, and so kind. You shine like a bright morning star. Jesus, You're the sweetest name of all. You always hear me when I call; You lift me up each time I fall. Your name is like honey on my lips; Your spirit's like water to my soul; Your word is a lamp unto my feet. Jesus, holy and anointed one. Holy, holy, holy is the Lord of hosts, who was and is and is to come. Lose yourself in Him today. Sit at His feet. Everything that's bothering you—come unto Him. He's wanting to give you rest today. Jesus, Your presence makes me whole. We are thirsty; we need more. Fill our cup, Lord; we lift it up. Come and quench this thirsting of our soul. Bread of heaven, Feed us till we want no more. Lord, we worship You. Father, there are so many people and so many needs today. You inhabit the praises of Your people, and I thank You that we call them healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus, from the top of their head to the soles of their feet. I believe we receive what You said You'd do for us. With Your stripes, we're healed today. So Father, I agree with them that they're healed and whole and well. Delivered from all sickness and disease; delivered from the yoke of life and the bondage of sickness. We cast our care over onto You and lean confidently in You. We believe that today Your words are life to those that find them and health to all their flesh. Every single person who's believing for that right now, place your hand on where you're hurting. We speak healing, wholeness, and wellness over you right now in Jesus' name. Father, I thank You that the anointing is the burden-removing, yoke-destroying power, and You're removing every yoke. We take our care out of our prayer. We have the mind of Christ. We're not tormented in our thoughts anymore; we have the mind of Christ. Depression, anxiety, fear, loneliness, worry—we cast our care over onto You. God supplies all our needs according to His riches in glory by Christ Jesus. All their needs are met—spiritually, physically, financially, emotionally. Blessed in the city and the field, coming in and going out. Their household is blessed. Their marriages are whole; their children walk upright before You and will be saved. Wayward children are coming home. Satan, get your hands off of wayward children. No one's too far gone for Jesus to save. We call their minds renewed. You're the waymaker; You will bring it to pass. It may seem that the mountain of debt is on top of you, but I believe God's a waymaker and He's Jehovah Jireh—He will provide. We believe everything we put our hands to will prosper. We're calling those seeds in now. Harvest, come forth in Jesus' name! We call the prosperity angels to go right now and bring our harvest in. Good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give unto us. You're a God of the overflow. This is a time of great overflow, not barely getting by. Thank You for supernatural increase over our houses today. I call your finances blessed. I call you to have more than enough. Give them creative ideas for jobs, raises, bonuses, benefits, sales, commissions, interest, income, rebates, returns, checks in the mail, gifts, and surprises. Finding money, bills paid off, bills decreased. This is a time like never before that the sowers and the reapers will go hand in hand. Abundant harvest is coming over them. We call those things that be not as though they were. We're blessed and prosperous; we're not barely getting by. Overflow belongs to us. The spirit of increase is on me. God is an abundant God. This is a time to soar and not be broke, to go forth and take the land with a back like a crowbar. We are those children who say we will take the land for Jesus and not do it barely half-cocked. We're taking back what the devil stole. Poverty stops with them. I will not be under the curse of poverty; poverty is a curse. It's not a blessing. "God keeps you poor to keep you humble"—that's ignorant. He is a God of more than enough. Don't allow the devil to steal and destroy anything. Poverty is a kill, steal, and destroy. True poverty—America does not know true poverty. Go to Haiti; there's true poverty in Haiti. That's true poverty—when your stomach's so swelled up and you're dying of hunger. Poverty is a curse. The body of Christ has to come out of stupid thinking. God wants you to have exceedingly, abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. If you sew a seed, God will provide for the need. You've got to believe God for big, like George Mueller. I know that story because my little girl watched it on VeggieTales. Believe God for big; stop believing for small. Thank You, Lord, that we have protection concerning viruses. We call that virus down in Jesus' name. We have the authority of the believer. A thousand shall fall at our side and ten thousand at our right hand, but nothing shall come nigh us. We'll not be afraid of any kind of pestilence or plagues. Jesus dwells on the inside of us. Who is this uncircumcised Philistine that he tries to defy the armies of the Lord? Concerning disease, plagues, cancers, and diabetes—who is this uncircumcised Philistine? Jehovah Jireh dwells on the inside of me. I lack no good thing. I renew my mind from stinking thinking today. We resist the devil and he must flee. Folks, you've got to be like a bulldog on a bone. "You are not going to steal from me anymore, devil!" Stand up on the inside. The waves try to knock you down, but I keep standing. I'm not moved by what I see or feel; I'm moved by what the word of God says. How bad do you want change? When you get some grit down inside you—"I will not be moved by this anymore!" When the police say your kid did something bad again—no, my child is turning around. I call him saved and delivered. I refuse to be moved by circumstances. My daughter is overcoming; she's healed and whole. When the doctor gives a bad report, I'm not moved by what I see. With His stripes, I am healed. The word is my foundation. I stagger not at the promise of God through unbelief. I am not moved by the report of the doctor. I will live a long life and declare the works of the Lord. He said He would satisfy me with long life, and I'm not satisfied yet. I hope this blessed you today. That's how you live by faith. Lean on Him and be confident in Him. He gives us a garment of praise for a spirit of heaviness. Worship Him in spirit and in truth today. My son said an hour and eight minutes. We'll do more prayer videos. Let's think bigger. God wants to use everybody, and we're in the end here. If you're new here, subscribe and click the notification bell. We pray for President Trump for special covering. Cover his mind and body. Thank You for President Trump today—that he will release the wealth from the deep for the body of Christ. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you and we love you. God bless you all, and we'll see you again soon. Bye-bye.]
